title: Dark Ink Studio
description: Where shadows become art. Specializing in blackwork, dark realism, and occult-inspired tattoo design.

pages.title: The Raven's Eye
pages.description: A blackwork piece inspired by Nordic mythology. The all-seeing eye of Odin, wrapped in raven feathers.

pages.title: Bone Garden
pages.description: Floral skulls intertwined with thorned roses. A reminder that beauty grows from decay.

pages.title: Serpent's Embrace
pages.description: An ouroboros design with geometric dotwork patterns. The eternal cycle of creation and destruction.

pages.title: Shadow Forest
pages.description: A sleeve concept featuring dead trees silhouetted against a full moon. Blackwork with negative space highlights.
